.msg.ai    { background: #262b36; border: 1px solid #445; }
.msg.tool  { background: #2e3330; border: 1px solid #474; }
summary { cursor:pointer; }
</style>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: DropObject</strong></summary>

**Content**
Drop target position was not initially reachable; you moved to \(x=0.93, y=0.08, z=0.39\) and dropped object 57 successfully.

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] Evidence: From the current perception, the object tagged 57 is identified as the plate on the table. Hypothesis: Object 57 is the plate to pick as requested. Verification step: I walked closer to the object to pick it successfully, and then I dropped it on the floor close to my current position. Decision and Next action: The plate \(object 57\) has been picked and placed on the floor. Task completed.

<details>
